title: Marketing & Merch Expansion for Gamescom 2025
brief: This proposal seeks funding of up to 5,775 EUR (in ATLAS equivalent) from the DAO Treasury to expand the reach and impact of the already approved PIP 8 (Star Atlas Comet Meetup at Gamescom 2025). The event will take place on August 23, 2025, in Cologne, Germany, during Europe’s largest gaming convention.
description:
# PIP-18: Marketing & Merch Expansion for Gamescom 2025 [Funding]

# 1. HEADER

* **Star Atlas Comet:** Marketing & Merch Expansion for Gamescom 2025

* **Author:** Kiwimi, VB, Shaddix

___

# 2. SUMMARY

* This proposal seeks funding of **up to 5,775 EUR (in ATLAS equivalent)** from the **DAO Treasury** to expand the reach and impact of the already approved **PIP 8 (Star Atlas Comet Meetup at Gamescom 2025).** The event will take place on **August 23, 2025, in Cologne, Germany,** during Europe’s largest gaming convention.
* This proposal includes branded merchandise (T-shirts and bags), printed materials (flyers, stickers, Epic Game Key cards) with a capped print budget, reusable event banners, and high-quality photo and video documentation. All expenses will be reimbursed post-event based on actual costs. This proposal is submitted under the Star Atlas Ecosystem Fund.

___

# 3. MOTIVATION

* Gamescom is Europe’s largest gaming convention with over 300,000 attendees – a unique
opportunity to present Star Atlas to a broad and international audience. While the already approved Star Atlas Comet Meetup (PIP 8) provides the framework, its full potential can only be realized through complementary measures such as event marketing, visible community presence, and professional documentation.
* This PIP aims to transform the event into a visible, lasting milestone for the community by
strengthening onboarding, reinforcing identity, and showcasing the DAO’s capacity for high-impact, real-world activation.

___

# 4. SPECIFICATION

## 4.1 Definitions of key terms or concepts

* Star Atlas Comet: A community-led meetup during Gamescom 2025 in Cologne, launched via PIP 8, and intended as a recurring DAO event.
* DAO Visibility Package: A bundle of merchandise, marketing materials, and media production to increase the visibility of the DAO and the Star Atlas brand.
* Epic Game Key: A single-use activation code unlocking Star Atlas UE5 gameplay via the Epic Games Store.
* #SAComet2025: Unified hashtag for community-generated content before, during, and after the event.

## 4.2 Proposed Changes/Actions

**Print Materials**

* Flyers, business cards with Epic Game Keys, and sticker sheets will be printed with a combined budget of up to 500 €. The PIP project team will determine the exact quantity based on the best pricing and design needs. Costs will not exceed this budget and will be invoiced strictly based on actual receipts and proven expenditure.  Cards will include a unique Epic Game Key for direct access to the Star Atlas UE5 game.

**Merchandise**

* One hundred T-shirts and one hundred drawstring bags will be produced and distributed to registered attendees.
* Designs will include DAO branding and a partner section for sponsor logos.

**Banners**

* 2 reusable roll-up banners with timeless branding (no date), suitable for future DAO/Comet events.

**Media Coverage**

* One-person setup from the Star Atlas community (professional senior content creator).
* 8 hours of on-site documentation (photo and video) including:
* 50–80 edited photos
* 1–2 minute aftermovie with music, subtitles, intro/outro branding, and DAO CTA
* Delivery within 4 weeks post-event

*All reimbursements for services and materials listed above (excluding media coverage) will occur immediately after the respective service has been delivered and the corresponding invoice has been submitted and verified. For the media coverage, a fixed amount of 1,500 € plus a 10% price fluctuation buffer will be paid without invoice once the deliverables have been fully provided to the satisfaction of the project team.*

**Onboarding Measurement**

* QR codes and Discord invites will be tracked.
* Epic Game Key redemptions offer valuable conversion insights.
* Social media engagement measured via hashtag #SAComet2025

___

# 5. STAKEHOLDER IMPACT

## 5.1 If the PIP succeeds

**Positive Impact for Community:**
* Stronger identity and group presence
* Enhanced event experience and recognition
* Opportunity to share and showcase involvement

**Positive Impact for DAO:**
* Increased brand visibility
* New member onboarding and engagement
* High-quality media content for ongoing use

## 5.2 Potential Risks

**For Community:**
* Uneven benefit for online vs. on-site members (mitigated by Aftermovie and media
distribution)

**For Project Team:**
* Logistical overhead (mitigated by planning and volunteer coordination)

**For DAO:**
* Game key misuse or non-redemption (tracked and monitored)
* Currency fluctuations (mitigated by 10% ATLAS buffer)

___

# 6. IMPLEMENTATION DETAILS

**Timeline Overview**
* June 2025: Design finalization, vendor selection, media briefing
* July 2025: Printing and production
* August 23, 2025: Event execution
* By September 30, 2025: Postproduction, reporting, and content release

**Execution Details**
* Project coordination: Kiwimi, VB, Shaddix
* Merch design & logistics: Project team
* Media production: Selected community content creator
* Onboarding metrics & distribution: Volunteers and team on-site

**Challenge -- *Mitigation***
* Delayed production -- *Early ordering, local suppliers*
* Insufficient volunteers -- *Recruitment via Discord & calls to action*
* Key misuse -- *Controlled distribution, one-time codes*
* Unwilling photo subjects -- *Opt-out at check-in, privacy signage*

___

# 7. TIMELINE

**Phase -- *Task* -- Completion Target**
* Planning -- *Finalize design, media briefing* -- June 30, 2025
* Production -- *Print/deliver all materials* -- July 31, 2025
* Execution -- *Event and media coverage* -- August 23, 2025
* Postprocessing -- *Aftermovie, reporting, publishing* -- September 30, 2025

**Dependencies:**
* Star Atlas for Epic Keys & Discord link; suppliers for print/delivery; creator formedia turnaround.

___

# 8. COST & RESOURCE ALLOCATION

**One-Time Costs (based on actual invoicing):**
* Item -- *Qty* -- Unit Price -- **Max Total**
* T-Shirts -- *Qty 100* --  20 € -- **2,000 €**
* Drawstring Bags -- *Qty 100* -- 7.50 € -- **750 €**
* Print Materials (Flyers, Stickers, Key Cards) -- *Qty variable* -- variable -- **max. 500 €**
* Roll-up Banners -- *Qty 2* -- 250 € -- **500 €**
* Photo & Video (8h, incl. editing) -- flat rate, no invoice -- 1 -- **1,500 €**

**Subtotal: 5,525 €**

* +10% ATLAS buffer (DAO Council approved): **525 €**
* The 10% buffer is calculated on each submitted invoice to account for potential ATLAS price fluctuations at the time of payout. The recipient reserves a 7-day right to review and verify whether the received ATLAS amount matches the value of the invoice (within the buffer range). In case of a shortfall, the recipient is entitled to file a complaint and request a top-up.

## **Total Request from DAO Treasury: 5,775 €**

* Source of funding: DAO Treasury

**Ongoing Costs**:

* N/A 

___

# 9. ADDITIONAL DETAILS

## 9.1 Conflicts of Interest:
None. The media creator is a community member and not part of the project team. Leftover merchandise and banners are stored and managed by the PIP project team (Kiwimi, VB, Shaddix) for future DAO use. These items will not be used for private or commercial purposes.

## 9.2 Earlier Versions: 
This PIP builds directly on the already approved PIP 8 (Star Atlas Comet Meetup).

## 9.3 Deliverables:
* 100 branded T-shirts and 100 drawstring bags
* Up to approx. 1,000 flyers, stickers, and Epic Game Key cards (exact quantities determined by project team, total cost limited to 500 € based on actual invoices)
* 2 reusable roll-up banners
* 50–80 professional photos
* 1–2 minute aftermovie with branding and subtitles
* Public recap report (KPIs, media, lessons learned). Any leftover merchandise will be raffled off during the event or retained for future community events, coordinated with the DAO.

**Long-term benefits:**
* Increased visibility and reach of the Star Atlas DAO
* Higher onboarding rate through QR & key strategy
* Reusable marketing tools for future community events
